title: Contact Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC) - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC)
Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC) is committed to improving services for Canadians by working with partners to provide a single point of access to the full range of government services and benefits that Canadians want and need.
- Find a Service Canada office
- Find a Passport office

### Employment Insurance
- For trustees (employer bankruptcies only)
- Canada Pension Plan (CPP)
- Old Age Security (OAS)
- International social security agreements
- Canadian government annuities
- Social Insurance Number
- Apprenticeship grants
- Wage Earner Protection Program
- Canadian Benefit for Parents of Young Victims of Crime
- My Service Canada Account (MSCA)
- Canadian Dental Care Plan

### Resources for employees
- Office status for ESDC employees
